case.title: GC Landscape and Repeat Fragility
case.workflow: Use analytics tracks to identify composition features that may complicate PCR, synthesis, or sequencing.

records.name: mCherry_CDS
records.origin: Monomeric red fluorescent protein from the mFruit engineering lineage.
records.why_it_matters: mCherry is a real-world counterexample to GFP: same broad job as a reporter, different sequence history, color, and engineering constraints.
records.source_label: PubMed: A monomeric red fluorescent protein

records.name: lacZ_alpha_fragment
records.origin: lacZ alpha fragment from the classic blue-white screening system associated with cloning vectors such as pUC19.
records.why_it_matters: This fragment is a perfect teaching example of phenotype-linked DNA: inserting the wrong thing into the wrong place changes colony color.
